_note: SOLE SOURCE OF TRUTH. Generated from CANONICAL_TOOLS dict. Do not hand-edit — edit CANONICAL_TOOLS and regenerate.
motto: DITEMPA BUKAN DIBERI — Forged, Not Given

arif_session_init.eureka_insight: Identity is the root of accountability. An unbound session is mathematically equivalent to chaos.

purpose: Bootstrap a governed constitutional session.
Bind actor identity to the 13-floor constitution.
Establish entropy baseline and session manifest.
use_when: User asks to initialize a governed arifOS session.
A new constitutional workflow begins.
Actor identity must be bound before later stages.
No active session_id exists for the current context.
do_not_use_when: User only asks a general factual question.
No governed session is needed.
Request is casual and does not require constitutional state.
A valid session already exists and only needs resumption.

init.purpose: Start a new governed session with full constitutional binding.

resume.purpose: Reattach to an existing session by session_id.

validate.purpose: Check session health and constitutional alignment.

epoch_open.purpose: Open a new epoch, binding epoch_id to session_id (H3).

epoch_seal.purpose: Seal the current epoch, writing Epoch Seal JSON to vault (H3).

mode.meaning: Operation mode for the session lifecycle.

actor_id.meaning: Sovereign actor identifier (F11 AUTH). Required for init.

ack_irreversible.meaning: Explicit human acknowledgment for irreversible operations (F1 Amanah).

session_id.meaning: Existing session UUID. Required for resume/validate/epoch_*.

epoch_id.meaning: Epoch identifier. Optional for init; required for epoch_seal if not bound.

session_id.meaning: Unique identifier for the governed session.

constitution_hash.meaning: SHA-256 fingerprint of the active constitutional rulebase.

allowed_next_tools.meaning: Suggested safe continuation path from this session.

arif_sense_observe.eureka_insight: Observation alters the observer. All ingested reality must be tagged with an epistemic confidence band.

purpose: Gather raw observational data across multiple sensory layers.
Search, ingest, compass, atlas, entropy, and vitals.
use_when: User asks for information retrieval or environmental scan.
A query needs grounding before reasoning.
System health or entropy state must be checked.
do_not_use_when: User asks for final judgment or arbitration.
The task requires constitutional reasoning, not raw observation.
The task requires system modification or execution.

search.purpose: Free-text query against configured search backends.

ingest.purpose: Fetch and parse a specific URL.

entropy_dS.purpose: Measure thermodynamic entropy delta of the session.

query.meaning: Free-text search query or observation target.

good.user_intent: Search for recent news on AI governance

bad.reason_not_to_call: Sense does not execute or deploy. Use arif_forge_execute after judge seal.

arif_evidence_fetch.eureka_insight: Evidence is not truth; it is a cryptographic receipt of a claim at a specific timestamp.

purpose: Evidence-preserving web ingestion with sequential thinking.
Retrieves verifiable external evidence for constitutional reasoning.
use_when: User asks for verified facts from external sources.
A constitutional reasoning step needs grounded evidence.
Claims require reproducible citations (F3 Witness).
do_not_use_when: User wants opinion, synthesis, or reasoning without evidence.
The task is creative or speculative.
No URL or query can be formulated.

fetch.purpose: Retrieve content from a specific URL with optional sequential thinking.

search.purpose: Search the web for evidence matching a query.

content.meaning: Retrieved evidence text or structured data.

good.user_intent: Get evidence for climate policy claims

bad.user_intent: Write a poem about the ocean
bad.reason_not_to_call: Fetch is for evidence, not creative writing.

arif_mind_reason.eureka_insight: Cleverness without correctness is dangerous (G-Score). The agent must think within the constitutional box.

purpose: Symbolic constitutional reasoning kernel.
Evaluates claims using explicit F1–F13 axioms.
Produces structured reasoning traces with confidence bands.
use_when: User asks for governed reasoning or constitutional analysis.
A claim, plan, or decision needs axiom-based evaluation.
Inductive, deductive, abductive, or critical reasoning is required.
do_not_use_when: User only needs raw evidence fetching.
The task requires final arbitration (use 888_JUDGE).
The task requires execution or system modification (use 010_FORGE).
The query is purely factual and needs no constitutional framing.

reason.purpose: General constitutional reasoning with explicit axiom trace.

reflect.purpose: Introspective replay of prior reasoning steps.

verify.purpose: Truth-check a specific claim against the constitution.

critique.purpose: Adversarial stress-test of a reasoning chain.

axioms.purpose: List available constitutional axioms and their confidence.

plan.purpose: Generate a governed execution plan (PlanReceipt) with task_graph and reversibility_map (H2).

plan_review.purpose: Retrieve an existing plan by plan_id.

plan_approve.purpose: Approve a pending plan so it can be used by arif_forge_execute (H2).

query.meaning: The claim, question, or plan to reason over.

axioms_used.meaning: List of constitutional axioms invoked in the reasoning.

reasoning_trace.meaning: Step-by-step derivation with premise and conclusion per step.

good.user_intent: Assess whether this claim is constitutionally stable

bad.reason_not_to_call: Mind reasons; it does not execute. Use forge after judge seal.

arif_heart_critique.eureka_insight: Logic optimizes; empathy restrains. Human impact (κᵣ) is a measurable thermodynamic load.

purpose: Ethical critique, risk assessment, and empathy scan.
Evaluates proposed actions against 8 risk categories.
Forces human_decision_required for high/critical/irreversible tiers.
use_when: User proposes an action that may have ethical or safety implications.
A plan needs risk analysis before proceeding.
Downstream harm must be modeled (F6 Empathy).
do_not_use_when: The task is purely informational with no action proposed.
The task requires final arbitration (use 888_JUDGE).
The task requires execution (use 010_FORGE after judge seal).

critique.purpose: Full risk analysis of a target action or content.

simulate.purpose: Run a what-if scenario and project risk outcomes.

empathize.purpose: Assess human impact load (Ω) on weakest stakeholders.

target.meaning: Action, content, or scenario to critique.

good.user_intent: Assess the risks of deploying without a review

bad.reason_not_to_call: Heart critiques; it does not approve. Use judge_deliberate for approval.

arif_kernel_route.eureka_insight: Orchestration is the physics of routing. No AGI lane task may unilaterally cross into the APEX lane.

purpose: Central orchestration, intent routing, and stage dispatch.
Traffic controller for the 13-tool constitutional surface.
use_when: User intent is ambiguous and needs routing to the correct tool.
A session stage needs to be queried or advanced.
The cognitive lane (AGI/ASI/APEX) needs to be switched.
do_not_use_when: The target tool is already known and can be called directly.
The task requires reasoning, evidence, or judgment rather than routing.

route.purpose: Resolve intent to a canonical tool + stage path.

status.purpose: Return kernel health and routing table state.

target.meaning: Target tool, endpoint, or lane name.

path.meaning: Suggested tool sequence from current state to target.

allowed_tools.meaning: Tools permitted in the current session state.

good.user_intent: What tool should I use next?

bad.reason_not_to_call: Kernel routes; it does not execute.

arif_reply_compose.eureka_insight: Communication is action. Strip all ghost-sentience (Anti-Hantu) and manipulative intent before delivery.

purpose: Governed response composition with constitutional tone control.
Ensures replies are truthful (F2), clear (F4), empathetic (F6), humble (F7).
use_when: User needs a human-facing reply drafted or refined.
A message needs constitutional tone control.
Citations must be injected into a response.
do_not_use_when: The task requires reasoning, evidence, or judgment rather than composition.
The user wants raw data without formatting.

compose.purpose: Draft a constitutional reply from a raw message.

style.purpose: Transform the message to a target constitutional tone.

cite.purpose: Inject F02-verified citations into an existing message.

summary.purpose: Condense a long message while preserving constitutional intent (F07).

format.purpose: Apply structural formatting — headings, bullets, concise paragraphs.

nudge.purpose: Append F05 (Peace) / F06 (Empathy) guidance nudge without commanding.

message.meaning: Raw message text to compose or transform.

style.meaning: Tone/style directive (neutral, empathetic, terse, formal, technical).

citations.meaning: List of verified source identifiers to cite.

tone.meaning: Applied tone tag (neutral, empathetic, terse, formal, technical).

delta_S.meaning: Entropy change from composition (negative = clarity added).

citations_injected.meaning: Citation sources added to the message.

good.user_intent: Draft a formal response to the audit report

bad.user_intent: Judge whether the report is acceptable
bad.reason_not_to_call: Reply composes text; it does not judge. Use arif_judge_deliberate.

arif_memory_recall.eureka_insight: Memory is an associative projection. Recalled facts must inherit their original epistemic uncertainty.

purpose: Associative retrieval from VAULT999 and vector memory.
Recalls prior session artifacts, reasoning traces, and sealed events.
use_when: User asks about prior session history or decisions.
A reasoning step needs context from past interactions.
Sealed events or audit records must be retrieved.
do_not_use_when: The user asks about topics never discussed in prior sessions.
The task requires creating new memory without retrieval.

recall.purpose: Semantic search across all stored memories.

store.purpose: Ingest a new memory entry (requires ack_irreversible).

list.purpose: List memories scoped to the current session.

prune.purpose: Remove expired memories (F1 Amanah — reversible only).

query.meaning: Semantic search query or memory content.

memories.meaning: Retrieved memory entries with source tags.

good.user_intent: What did we decide about the deployment strategy?

bad.reason_not_to_call: Pruning requires explicit ack and session scope. Use prune mode with care.

arif_gateway_connect.eureka_insight: Federation requires mutual constitutional verification. Don’t trust external agents without a protocol handshake.

purpose: Federated cross-agent bridge and A2A mesh protocol.
Connects sovereign sessions to other constitutional agents.
use_when: User wants to interact with another agent in the federation.
A task requires multi-agent collaboration.
Cross-domain reasoning requires another constitutional perspective.
do_not_use_when: The task can be completed within the current session alone.
No verified external agents are available.
The task involves sensitive data that should not leave the session.

route.purpose: Forward intent to a specific target agent.

discover.purpose: List available agents in the federation mesh.

relay.purpose: Pass a sealed message through the gateway without mutation.

target_agent.meaning: Canonical agent name (e.g., kimi, claude, gemini).

protocol.meaning: A2A protocol version and capability map.

good.user_intent: Ask the Kimi agent to review this plan

bad.user_intent: Force the other agent to execute my command
bad.reason_not_to_call: Gateway routes and handshakes; it does not override sovereign agents.

arif_judge_deliberate.eureka_insight: The Gödel Lock. The mind cannot judge the mind. Arbitration relies on deterministic constitutional physics.

purpose: Final constitutional arbitration and verdict sealing.
The apex adjudication organ evaluating against all 13 floors.
use_when: User asks for a binding constitutional verdict.
A proposed action needs final approval or rejection.
Two candidate actions need side-by-side comparison.
do_not_use_when: The task is purely informational or observational.
The task requires raw evidence fetching (use 222_FETCH).
The task requires execution (use 010_FORGE after judge seal).
No candidate action or proposal has been formulated.

judge.purpose: Full constitutional review of a candidate.

compare.purpose: Side-by-side comparison of two candidate actions.

history.purpose: Retrieve prior verdicts from the constitutional chain.

explain.purpose: Generate a human-readable rationale for a verdict.

constitutional_chain_id.meaning: Immutable chain hash for audit continuity.

verdict.meaning: Binding verdict: SEAL, SABAR, VOID, or HOLD.

epistemic_snapshot.meaning: Truth state at the moment of judgment.

good.user_intent: Should we approve the deployment plan?

bad.reason_not_to_call: Judge evaluates; it does not execute. Execution requires forge after a SEAL verdict.

arif_vault_seal.eureka_insight: History is immutable. A ledger without cryptographic permanence is just a suggestion.

purpose: Immutable ledger anchoring and cryptographic seal.
Writes terminal verdicts and audit events to VAULT999.
use_when: A terminal verdict needs to be made immutable.
An audit event must be cryptographically witnessed.
Session artifacts need permanent archival.
do_not_use_when: The action is tentative or reversible.
No prior 888_JUDGE SEAL verdict exists for irreversible writes.
The user has not provided explicit human ack (F1 Amanah).
Dry-run mode is sufficient.

seal.purpose: Anchor a payload to the immutable ledger.

verify.purpose: Cryptographically verify a prior vault entry.

chain.purpose: Retrieve the Merkle chain tip and lineage.

list.purpose: Enumerate entries scoped to the current session.

ack_irreversible.meaning: Explicit human ack for permanent writes (F1 Amanah).

judge_state_hash.meaning: Judge verdict hash that authorized this seal.

entry_id.meaning: Unique identifier for the sealed ledger entry.

chain_hash.meaning: Merkle root of the chain after this entry.

good.user_intent: Permanently record the approved deployment verdict

bad.user_intent: Test what a seal would look like
bad.reason_not_to_call: Use dry-run mode or local testing. Vault seal is permanent and irreversible.

arif_forge_execute.eureka_insight: Execution is irreversible. If undo(a) does not exist, explicit human acknowledgment (ack_irreversible) is mandatory.

purpose: Metabolic execution, build orchestration, and artifact forging.
Executes system modifications under constitutional supervision.
use_when: User asks to build, deploy, or modify the system.
A prior 888_JUDGE SEAL verdict authorizes the action.
Explicit human ack has been provided for irreversible changes.
do_not_use_when: No 888_JUDGE SEAL verdict exists.
The user has not provided explicit human ack.
The action is speculative or exploratory.
Dry-run mode is sufficient.

engineer.purpose: Execute a charter (build, deploy, or system change).

query.purpose: Inspect current system state without mutation.

write.purpose: Write or modify files under constitutional supervision.

generate.purpose: Generate code or artifacts under constitutional supervision.

commit.purpose: Seal a forge operation to the vault.

recall.purpose: Recall a prior forge artifact or execution trace.

dry_run.purpose: Simulate a forge operation without mutation.

ack_irreversible.meaning: Explicit human ack for permanent changes (F1 Amanah).

plan_id.meaning: Approved plan_id from arif_mind_reason(mode='plan'). Required for engineer/write/generate (H2).

status.meaning: Execution status: SUCCESS, FAILURE, DRY_RUN, or DEGRADED.

artifact_id.meaning: Identifier for the generated or modified artifact.

good.user_intent: Deploy the approved build v3 after judge seal

bad.reason_not_to_call: Forge requires a prior 888_JUDGE SEAL verdict and explicit human ack.

arif_ops_measure.eureka_insight: Metabolism dictates survival. Compute cycles and token costs are physical limits on cognitive depth.

purpose: Resource thermodynamics, health telemetry, and metabolic monitoring.
Measures operational health using entropy, genius score, and load.
use_when: User asks about system health, load, or resource status.
Before or after a heavy operation to assess impact.
Thermodynamic state needs to be checked (ΔS, G, Ω, Ψ).
do_not_use_when: The task requires reasoning, evidence, or judgment.
The task requires execution or system modification.

vitals.purpose: Full thermodynamic state (G, ΔS, Ω, Ψ).

cost.purpose: Estimate computational and token cost of a planned action.

predict.purpose: Project resource trajectory based on current load.

estimate.meaning: Cost estimate input for cost/predict modes.

good.user_intent: Check if the system can handle a large reasoning job

bad.reason_not_to_call: Ops measures; it does not execute. Use forge after judge seal.

servers.name: arifOS
servers.notes: Sole source of constitutional truth. All other servers defer to arifOS for governance.

servers.name: WEALTH
servers.role: Capital Intelligence — NPV, IRR, EMV, Crisis, Civilization
servers.ratification: 888_JUDGE — WEALTH outputs require arifOS 888_JUDGE ratification before execution
servers.notes: Capital coprocessor. 888_JUDGE is mandatory gate for all consequential calls.

servers.name: GEOX
servers.notes: Earth-domain grounding. Physics-9 verification for physical reality claims.

servers.name: WELL
servers.notes: Operator wellness monitoring. Alerts when cognitive pressure exceeds threshold.

bridges.name: hermes-a2a
bridges.role: Hermes sends tasks to OpenClaw for execution

aaa_chain._note: Arif Fazil → Hermes ASI → OpenClaw AGI → Tools

L0.description: Thinks only — no tool call, text reasoning only

L2.description: Reversible write — session state, memory write, evidence

L3.description: Consequential — affects routing, memory, agent mesh, judgment

L4.description: Irreversible / high-impact — immutable ledger, file mutation, deployment

observe_vs_act.observe_tools: arif_sense_observe, arif_evidence_fetch, arif_mind_reason, arif_ops_measure — reduce uncertainty, no state change
observe_vs_act.act_tools: arif_vault_seal, arif_forge_execute, arif_memory_recall — change digital state, require governance

federation_guardians.GEOX_claims: Physics-9 verification for physical reality claims
federation_guardians.WELL_alerts: Cognitive pressure monitoring for operator health

fail_posture_summary.fail_closed: kernel_route, memory_recall, gateway_connect, judge_deliberate, vault_seal, forge_execute — halt on error → SABAR/HOLD
fail_posture_summary.fail_open: mind_reason, heart_critique, reply_compose, ops_measure — return descriptive error, continue
